rows.encryption_or_protection_control: checkpoint_ref, restore_drill_ref, privacy reconciliation outcome, audit chain continuity, replay/enquiry limitation state
rows.erasure_behavior: Reopened access remains blocked or limited until compensating re-erasure and blocker resolution complete where required.
rows.legal_hold_behavior: Blocked states remain explicit legal posture rather than operator notes.
notes: Restore evidence is not lawful production evidence until the contract reaches a reconciled state.
rows.survivability_or_fidelity_formula: reopen_access_state derives from privacy_reconciliation_state plus audit continuity and compensating re-erasure posture.
